A Char literal decodes to exactly one Unicode scalar value; empty, surrogate, or multi-scalar content is rejected.
Stable canonical Unicode escape is \u{HEX}; surrogate and out-of-range scalars are rejected.

Core unit canonicalization normalizes a unit expression to a dimension vector plus an exact rational scale, multiplies/divides by vector addition/subtraction, combines powers only with StaticInt exponents, removes zero exponents, and compares canonical pairs exactly. Display spelling and preferred catalog symbol selection are not part of type equality.
